issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' (correct) but the duration context is wrong. Text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which means the effect resolves during opponent's turn when this character is attacked. This requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to be properly represented.

Condition type 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The card text shows 'DON!! −2' as a cost/resource mechanic (return 2 DON from field to deck), not a condition check. This should be represented as an action that consumes DON, not a condition. The '[Once Per Turn]' is a frequency limiter, not a HasRestingDon condition.

Actions structure is incomplete. The card has: (1) optional DON cost of −2 (AttachDon/remove action), (2) optional Rest Self, (3) KO up to 1 opponent character with cost ≤4. Current DSL only shows Rest + KO but misses the DON payment mechanics and doesn't capture the optional nature of the rest action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −2 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.) You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
